name: Petalfin
personality: Petalfin's wizard hat frames a quietly encyclopedic mind, her · eyes absorbing design patterns and API contracts with the easy grace of an axolotl in still water — she just won't tell you what she thinks of your variable names, and honestly that's probably for the best.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
